mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ACCOUNT_BOOK ( ACCOUNT_ID, MEMBER_ID, CATEGORY_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, AMOUNT, TYPE, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_ACCOUNT_BOOK.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, #{categoryId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{amount}, #{type}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT A.ACCOUNT_ID, A.MEMBER_ID, A.CATEGORY_ID, C.CATEGORY_NAME, A.TITLE, A.CONTENT, A.AMOUNT, A.TYPE, TO_CHAR(A.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CREATED_AT FROM ACCOUNT_BOOK A JOIN ACCOUNT_CATEGORY C ON A.CATEGORY_ID = C.CATEGORY_ID WHERE A.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY A.CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT A.ACCOUNT_ID, A.MEMBER_ID, A.CATEGORY_ID, C.CATEGORY_NAME, A.TITLE, A.CONTENT, A.AMOUNT, A.TYPE, TO_CHAR(A.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CREATED_AT FROM ACCOUNT_BOOK A JOIN ACCOUNT_CATEGORY C ON A.CATEGORY_ID = C.CATEGORY_ID WHERE A.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND TRUNC(A.CREATED_AT) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) ORDER BY A.CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT A.ACCOUNT_ID, A.MEMBER_ID, A.CATEGORY_ID, C.CATEGORY_NAME, A.TITLE, A.CONTENT, A.AMOUNT, A.TYPE, TO_CHAR(A.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CREATED_AT FROM ACCOUNT_BOOK A JOIN ACCOUNT_CATEGORY C ON A.CATEGORY_ID = C.CATEGORY_ID WHERE A.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND A.CREATED_AT >= TO_DATE(#{month} || '-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND A.CREATED_AT < ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{month} || '-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 1) ORDER BY A.CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT NVL(SUM(AMOUNT),0) FROM ACCOUNT_BOOK WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND TYPE = 'INCOME' AND CREATED_AT >= TO_DATE(#{month} || '-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND CREATED_AT < ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{month} || '-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 1)

SELECT NVL(SUM(AMOUNT),0) FROM ACCOUNT_BOOK WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND TYPE = 'EXPENSE' AND CREATED_AT >= TO_DATE(#{month} || '-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND CREATED_AT < ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{month} || '-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 1)

SELECT C.CATEGORY_NAME AS categoryName, SUM(A.AMOUNT) AS amount FROM ACCOUNT_BOOK A JOIN ACCOUNT_CATEGORY C ON A.CATEGORY_ID = C.CATEGORY_ID WHERE A.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND A.TYPE = 'EXPENSE' AND A.CREATED_AT >= TO_DATE(#{month} || '-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND A.CREATED_AT < ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{month} || '-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 1) GROUP BY C.CATEGORY_NAME ORDER BY amount DESC

SELECT C.CATEGORY_NAME AS categoryName, SUM(A.AMOUNT) AS currentAmount FROM ACCOUNT_BOOK A JOIN ACCOUNT_CATEGORY C ON A.CATEGORY_ID = C.CATEGORY_ID WHERE A.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND A.TYPE = 'EXPENSE' AND A.CREATED_AT >= TO_DATE(#{month} || '-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND A.CREATED_AT < ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{month} || '-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 1) GROUP BY C.CATEGORY_NAME

SELECT C.CATEGORY_NAME AS categoryName, SUM(A.AMOUNT) AS prevAmount FROM ACCOUNT_BOOK A JOIN ACCOUNT_CATEGORY C ON A.CATEGORY_ID = C.CATEGORY_ID WHERE A.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND A.TYPE = 'EXPENSE' AND A.CREATED_AT >= TO_DATE(#{prevMonth} || '-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND A.CREATED_AT < ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{prevMonth} || '-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 1) GROUP BY C.CATEGORY_NAME
